title: digitaria pubiflora
intro: Digitaria pubiflora, also known as Finger Grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Digitaria pubiflora include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Digitaria pubiflora can be prepared as a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water, and it can also be used as a tea or dried and consumed as a powder.
